DEHREN
Enquiry
About me

Who looks after your property.

My name is Andreas Fruhnert. Craftsmanship, technology and personal service have been my home for many years – in Munich, and today in Zadar too.

For years I have run a caretaker service in Munich and know exactly what matters when looking after property: reliability, a watchful eye and the ability to solve problems before they grow. I now bring this experience to the Adriatic.

My craft

I am a trained electrician and car mechanic – and beyond that I have gained solid knowledge across many areas of building and systems technology. Much of what others need several companies for, I do myself.

Why that matters for your property

Whether small repairs and maintenance are due, the heating system needs checking and topping up with water, light bulbs need changing or the network and WiFi for the holiday flat should be set up – I quickly see what needs doing and get on with it. That saves you time, trips and cost, because not every little thing requires an external tradesperson to travel out. Larger works, or those requiring a certified master, I reliably coordinate with vetted specialists.

And on the water

In addition I am active as Skipper & Boat Rent in Zadar and at home on the sea with my own boat. That is exactly why I reliably reach properties on the islands too – where the road ends.

Andreas Fruhnert
My qualifications
ElectricianTrained trade – electrics & safety
Car mechanicTechnology & mechanics from the ground up
Solar / PVPhotovoltaics & solar technology
Network techInternet & WiFi for holiday properties
Gas & waterPlumbing & installation, fundamentals
Caretaker serviceYears of experience, Munich

Let’s get to know each other.

Best to tell me briefly about your property – we’ll discuss the rest in person.
